name: hoplite-skills
description: Hoplite authoring skills and the frontmatter-validation hook. The locked specs (frontmatter, expressing-edges) ship under references/ as the plugin's source of truth.

python_path.title: Python executable
python_path.description: Python 3 interpreter the frontmatter hook runs under (e.g. python3, python, or a full path). On Windows, python3 may resolve to the Microsoft Store stub; use python or a full path instead.
